Name: Macadamia Block M1 – 4ha Beaumont Variety (12yr, 4,000 Trees)
Description: 4-hectare macadamia orchard, variety Beaumont (SAMC 695 equivalent), planted 2013. 1,000 trees/ha, 12 years old, full production. Average yield 5 t/ha NIS. Drip-irrigated. Tzaneen, Limpopo.

Name: Macadamia Block M2 – 5ha HAES 814 Variety (10yr, 5,000 Trees)
Description: 5-hectare macadamia orchard, HAES 814 variety, planted 2015. High-yielding mid-season variety. Average yield 5.5 t/ha NIS. Drip-irrigated with fertigation. Young productive block, Tzaneen.

Name: Macadamia Block M3 – 3ha Nelmak 2 Variety (8yr, 3,000 Trees)
Description: 3-hectare macadamia orchard, Nelmak 2 (A4) variety, planted 2017. Early-bearing, late-maturing variety. Average yield 4.5 t/ha NIS. Planted in former avocado orchard site. In full production.

Name: Macadamia Block M4 – 4.5ha 695 Variety (9yr, 4,500 Trees)
Description: 4.5-hectare macadamia orchard, 695 variety (SAMC), planted 2016. High-oil, good cracking quality. Average yield 5 t/ha NIS. GPS-mapped blocks with individual tree monitoring.

Name: Macadamia Block M5 – 3.5ha Beaumont Young Block (5yr, 3,500 Trees)
Description: 3.5-hectare macadamia orchard, Beaumont variety, planted 2020. Young block coming into full production. Currently 1.5 t/ha NIS, expected to reach full yield by 2028. Drip-irrigated.

Name: Avocado Block A1 – 4ha Hass Variety (8yr, 4,000 Trees)
Description: 4-hectare Hass avocado orchard, planted 2017. 1,000 trees/ha. Yield 12 t/ha. Drip-irrigated. SAAGA member. Fruit supplied to Westfalia Fruit for EU export under GlobalGAP certification.

Name: Avocado Block A2 – 3ha Fuerte Variety (12yr, 3,000 Trees)
Description: 3-hectare Fuerte avocado orchard, planted 2013. 12-year established bearing trees. Yield 9 t/ha. Fuerte preferred for domestic Limpopo market and regional retail supply.

Name: Tommy Atkins Mango Block – 6ha (900 Trees, 11yr)
Description: 6-hectare Tommy Atkins mango plantation, 150 trees/ha, planted 2014. Yield 14 t/ha. MFCA South African Mango Producers' Association member. Exported via Limpopo Agri-hub. Under-canopy drip.

Name: Khirsapati Litchi Block – 2.5ha (250 Trees, 20yr)
Description: 2.5-hectare litchi plantation, Khirsapati variety, 100 trees/ha, planted 2005. Mature bearing trees. Yield 10 t/ha premium litchi. SAFLEC member. All fruit committed to Shoprite Fresh Produce.

Name: ACCO Brand Macadamia Harvester – 4-Row Sweeper & Gatherer
Description: ACCO 4-row self-propelled macadamia harvester with stick rake and elevator chain to trailer. GPS yield mapping. Capacity: 6 hectares/day. Used for Blocks M1–M4 harvest. Installed 2021.

Name: Macadamia Processing Plant – 10-Tonne/Hour Dehusker & Grader
Description: Complete macadamia primary processing plant: Staalmeester 10 t/hr dehusker/husker, Seco rotary grader (4 sizes), 5-tonne day bin, moisture meter, conveyors. SAMAC-registered facility.

Name: Macadamia Hot Air Drying Kiln – 40-Tonne Capacity
Description: Staalmeester dual-chamber hot-air drying kiln, 40-tonne total NIS capacity, LP gas burners, forced-air circulation. Reduces NIS moisture from 35% to 10% in 72hrs. SAMAC drying protocol compliant.

Name: Netafim Irrigation Control System – Full Farm Automation
Description: Netafim NetBeat automation system covering 35 hectares of macadamia and avocado. 45 independently controlled zones, soil moisture sensors, weather station, fertigation injectors. Remote app control.

Name: New Holland T6.175 Orchard Tractor (S/N: NHT6175AA104229)
Description: 2023 New Holland T6.175 orchard tractor, 175hp, 4WD, with narrow body for tree row access. GPS guidance, front linkage. Used for spraying, mulching and harvest bin transport.

Name: Macadamia NIS Stock – 180 Tonnes (Tzaneen Depot, SAMAC Cert)
Description: SAMAC-certified receipt for 180 tonnes of dried macadamia nuts-in-shell (NIS), moisture 9.5%, stored in Tzaneen dry depot. Ready for cracking. Committed to Mac Industries for kernel extraction.

Name: Macadamia Kernel Stock – 22 Tonnes Style 0/1 Premium Kernel
Description: SAMAC-certified receipt for 22 tonnes of Style 0 and Style 1 macadamia kernel, moisture 1.5%, stored in climate-controlled facility. Premium export-quality kernel for Asian confectionery market.

Name: Avocado Cold Store Receipt – 35 Tonnes Hass Avocado
Description: Westfalia-certified cold store receipt for 35 tonnes of Hass avocado, grade 1 and 2, stored at Tzaneen Packhouse cold room at 5°C. Ready for export palletisation. GlobalGAP audit passed.

Name: Dried Mango Chips Stock – 4.5 Tonnes (Packhouse Store)
Description: Receipt for 4.5 tonnes of HACCP-processed dried mango chips from Tommy Atkins crop, packed in 250g retail pouches. Stored in controlled humidity packhouse. Committed to Dis-Chem SA distribution.

Name: Cooperative Farm Title – Portion 8 of Farm Nooitgedacht (42ha)
Description: Title Deed for 42-hectare cooperative farming land, Portion 8 of Nooitgedacht 612 LT, Tzaneen. Deep Hutton loam soil, 950mm rainfall. Encompasses all macadamia and avocado blocks. Deed T6421/2012.
LockedReason: Pledged as collateral – FNB Agri Farm Bond

Name: Letaba River Water Use License – 420,000 m³/annum
Description: DWS Water Use License Ref No: 22/B65E/AHJ/3318. Authorized 420,000 m³/annum abstraction from Letaba River for drip irrigation of macadamia, avocado and mango blocks. License valid to 2045.

Name: Macadamia Pollination Apiary – 200 Langstroth Hives
Description: 200 Langstroth hives for macadamia pollination services. Apis mellifera capensis colonies, 30,000+ bees/hive. Moved into orchard blocks during flowering (August–October). Honey yield: 8t/annum.

Name: Limpopo Subtropical Honey Apiary – 80 Nucleus Hives
Description: 80 nucleus colony hives in subtropical bushveld adjacent to the cooperative. Used for queen rearing and nucleus sale. Apis mellifera scutellata stock. 30 nucleus splits sold annually to beekeepers.

Name: Macadamia Block M6 – 2ha New Planting (1yr, 2,000 Trees)
Description: 2-hectare new macadamia block, HAES 816 variety, planted September 2024. 1,000 trees/ha spaced 3m×7m. Drip irrigation established. First commercial harvest expected 2030. Long-term investment block.

Name: Isuzu FRR 600 Refrigerated Fruit Transport Truck
Description: 2022 Isuzu FRR 600 medium truck, 5-tonne insulated refrigerated body (2–8°C for avocados and litchi). Used for Packhouse-to-port and local retail distribution. Plates: LP 4522 GH.

Name: Packhouse Sorting & Packing Line – GlobalGAP Certified
Description: Vollema packhouse sorting and packing line: 3-lane sorting table, 4-lane grading rollers, electronic weight grader, vacuum packing station, carton erector, floor scale. GlobalGAP-certified facility.
